source_a_title: Data, statistics, and surveys on NZ forests | NZ Government
source_a_locator: New Zealand’s net stocked planted production forest covered an estimated 1.82 million hectares as at 1 April 2025.
source_b_locator: MPI forestry material describes most exotic plantation forestry as being concentrated in the North Island / central North Island, so North Island is used as the vanilla planted-forest proxy.
comment: National planted-production-forest total routed through the dominant North Island plantation belt proxy.
